# Hydride

## Getting started

### Prerequisite

- [Node.js v20+](https://nodejs.org/)
- Code editor
- Terminal

### Clone template

````tabs

== NPM

```sh
npx giget@latest gh:guarana-studio/hydride/templates/main [project-name]
```

==

== Bun

```sh
bunx giget@latest gh:guarana-studio/hydride/templates/main [project-name]
```

==

````

### Install dependencies

````tabs

== NPM

```sh
npm i
```

==

== Bun

```sh
bun i
```

==

````

### Development server

````tabs

== NPM

```sh
npm run dev
```

==

== Bun

```sh
bun run dev
```

==

````
